campus: Rome (Faculty of Mathematical, Physical and Natural Sciences, Department of Physics)
faculty: Scienze Matematiche, Fisiche e Naturali (Mathematical, Physical and Natural Sciences)
admission_type: restricted access – verification of requirements and personal preparation
admission_test_type: Verification of curricular requirements and personal preparation; no standardized written entrance test
application_platform: MoveIN platform for non-EU pre-selection; Infostud for admission

academic_requirements.prior_degree: A bachelor's degree in Physics, Mathematics, Engineering Physics, or related quantitative science
academic_requirements.curricular_requirements: [uncertain] – specific ECTS/SSD requirements not extracted from programme page

language_requirements.level: B1 CEFR in English (minimum stated by programme sources – lower than standard Sapienza B2)
language_requirements.note: The Physics programme requires a minimum B1 English certificate or 3 ECTS in English from a university programme. Acceptable: TOEFL, IELTS, or equivalent. Note: this is B1, not B2 — lower than most Sapienza English master programmes.
language_requirements.alternative: Achievement of an English language qualification in a university study programme (Bachelor's or Master's) that equals at least 3 ECTS is considered equivalent.

italian_language_requirement: Italian not required for admission; programme taught entirely in English.
application_deadline_eu: 31 July 2026 for EU and EU-equivalent candidates [uncertain]
application_deadline_non_eu: MoveIN pre-selection window 22 December 2025 – 15 May 2026 for non-EU candidates residing abroad
application_fee: €30 per application via MoveIN (max 2 per candidate)
required_documents: Bachelor's degree certificate or enrolment certificate
For foreign qualifications: Declaration of Value (DoV) or CIMEA statement
document_translation_authentication: Foreign documents require official translation and legalization/apostille plus Declaration of Value (DoV) or CIMEA statement.

entry_exam_or_test.selection: Verification of curricular requirements and personal preparation (not restricted by entrance exam)

source_quotes.quote: Degree Class: LM-17; Course Code: 33602; Faculty: Scienze Matematiche, Fisiche e Naturali; Language of Instruction: English

To be admitted to the Master's Degree in Physics, students must present a certificate attesting at least a B-1 English level according to the QCER or equivalent. The achievement of an English language qualification in a university study programme that equals at least 3 ECTS is considered as an equivalent qualification.

uncertainty_notes: English requirement is B1 (not the standard B2 required by most Sapienza English master programmes); this is a notable difference.
Multiple Physics programme codes found: 33602 (2025-2026) and 32384 (2024-2025); 33602 used as the current code.
Available curricula include Condensed Matter Physics (Theory and Experiment) and Biosystems — both taught in English.
Specific curricular ECTS requirements not extracted.
Per-programme non-EU quota and places not extracted.
